description_long: This object is a rectangular electronic keyboard with a modern, minimalist design. The main body is composed of a dark, likely plastic or composite casing, with a set of white and black keys arranged in a single row, reminiscent of a piano or synthesizer. The top panel features a small, rectangular display or control area, possibly for digital readouts or touch controls. The sides and base are solid and robust, suggesting durability and stability when placed on a flat surface. The keys are evenly spaced and slightly raised, designed for tactile interaction. The overall appearance is clean and functional, suitable for use in music studios, urban performance spaces, or home environments.
description: A modern, rectangular electronic keyboard with black and white keys, a dark casing, and a small top-panel display. The design is sleek and functional, ideal for musical use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full set of black and white keys and the top display panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the keyboard and the raised keys.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid back panel and the top display area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the depth and the arrangement of the keys.
